exec: bash -lc 'source .dbg/typeorm-decorator-crash.env 2>/dev/null || { DEBUG_SERVER_URL="http://127.0.0.1:7777/event"; DEBUG_SESSION_ID="typeorm-decorator-crash"; }; tmp=$(mktemp); : "# #region debug-point B:server-dev-entry"; curl -sX POST "$DEBUG_SERVER_URL" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"sessionId\":\"$DEBUG_SESSION_ID\",\"runId\":\"post-fix\",\"hypothesisId\":\"B\",\"location\":\"nodemon.json:5\",\"msg\":\"[DEBUG] server:dev launching backend executor\",\"data\":{\"exec\":\"ts-node --project api/tsconfig.json api/server.ts\",\"node\":\"$(node -v)\"},\"ts\":$(date +%s)000}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; : "# #endregion"; (ts-node --project api/tsconfig.json api/server.ts 2>&1 | tee "$tmp"); code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; tail_b64=$(tail -n 120 "$tmp" | base64 | tr -d "\n"); rm -f "$tmp"; : "# #region debug-point B:server-dev-exit"; curl -sX POST "$DEBUG_SERVER_URL" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"sessionId\":\"$DEBUG_SESSION_ID\",\"runId\":\"post-fix\",\"hypothesisId\":\"B\",\"location\":\"nodemon.json:5\",\"msg\":\"[DEBUG] server:dev backend process exited\",\"data\":{\"exitCode\":$code,\"tailB64\":\"$tail_b64\"},\"ts\":$(date +%s)000}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; : "# #endregion"; exit $code'
